IAT 201 — Group Project

SFU 2026

Contributions

Ark Ascension was built by a team of four — each bringing unique skills to bring this board game to life.

📊

Nima

Flowchart DesignerQuantitative Analyst

25%

contribution

Deliverables

  • ▸Turn-sequence flowchart (Mermaid/graph TD)
  • ▸Quantitative analysis of game balance
  • ▸Free-rider dynamics & Solar Sacrifice probability
  • ▸Faction playstyle breakdowns
🧪

Evan

Playtesting LeadGame Description Writer

25%

contribution

Deliverables

  • ▸Playtesting log (5-round simulation)
  • ▸End-of-round state tracking
  • ▸Game description — overview and pillars
  • ▸Balance feedback writeup
✍️

Brady Wu

Playtesting Co-LeadNarrative DesignerGame Description Writer

25%

contribution

Deliverables

  • ▸Playtesting log (5-round simulation)
  • ▸Thematic backstory & narrative ("The sun is dying…")
  • ▸Game description — tone and scenario framing
  • ▸Faction lore writing
📖

Amirkia

Rulebook AuthorVisual Gallery CuratorTrailer Producer

25%

contribution

Deliverables

  • ▸Complete rulebook (Setup, Race Boards, Turn Sequence, Win Condition)
  • ▸Visual gallery — faction card layouts
  • ▸Promotional trailer for Ark Ascension
  • ▸Print-and-play file preparation

IAT 201 — Interactive Arts & Technology · Simon Fraser University · 2026

Each team member contributed equally across research, design, and production phases.
